Take this 
Implementation Plan.md
 and implement this having in mind that Gameboard.tsx is really complex component 
 so i think it will be better if now we test the little parts and as an e2e test 
 to be tested the Gameboard.tsx Also if you mock the custom hooks how do you know 
 if they work. Mocking is needed for spectial places not for everywhere. Also i 
 want the signalR hub reciver full tested so i can be sure the data goes and comes 
 as expected
